selectedSkills.name: generate-test-cases
selectedSkills.reason: ACs require multiple validation rules: visibility, visualization elements, hierarchical order, and real-time updates.

selectedSkills.name: execute-tests
selectedSkills.reason: The real-time update requirement must be verified through functional interaction in a browser.

selectedSkills.name: run-accessibility-tests
selectedSkills.reason: Responsive design and diverse user base are explicitly mentioned; WCAG 2.2 AA testing is required.

selectedSkills.name: run-lighthouse-tests
selectedSkills.reason: Large numbers and high participation are noted, justifying a performance and SEO audit.

generate-test-cases.reason: AC complexity requires detailed scenario definition.

lighthouse.reason: Performance concern with high traffic/large data.
